title: 3d mob makeover
body:
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)

You know those 2D textures some mobs have, like the goat's beard or the axolotl's tail? Well, this resource pack makes them A WHOLE PIXEL WIDER! Yes, you read that right... A WHOLE PIXEL! It's not much, but it improves the look of the mobs a bit. I still have a few mobs left to add, and I'll probably include some future mobs too. Here are the ones currently in the pack:

    allay - the wings
    axolotl - the tail and legs
    bat - the wings and ears
    bee - the wings, legs, antennas and stinger
    breeze - the eyebrows
    chicken - the legs
    cod - the fins and tail
    elder guardian - the tail
    evoker fangs - the mouth and teeth
    frog - the tounge and feet
    goat - the beard and fur
    guardian - the tail
    hoglin - the hair
    parrot - the three feathers and feet
    salmon - the fins and tail
    silverfish - the dots on it's body
    skeletton - the ribcage
    sniffer - the ears and fur
    stray - the ribcage
    strider - the hair
    tadpole - the tail
    vex - the wings
    warden - the tendrils
    wither skeleton-the ribcage
